archetype: Soft Professional (Archetype 3 adapted for calm authority)

headings.instruction: Do not use Inter or generic sans. Add <link href='https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap' rel='stylesheet'>

styles.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-900

surfaces_and_glassmorphism.glass_panel: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/60 border border-white/50 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-2xl
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.glass_header: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-white/40 shadow-sm
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.primary_button: bg-[#3B82F6] hover:bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(59,130,246,0.39)] rounded-2xl font-medium transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 px-6 py-3
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.secondary_button: bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-white rounded-2xl font-medium transition-all duration-300 px-6 py-3
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.success_indicator: text-[#10B981] bg-emerald-50 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-medium border border-emerald-100

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 inside cards. Less is more.

motion_and_interactions.page_load: Framer Motion staggered children. Use 'container' with 'staggerChildren: 0.1' and 'item' with Y-axis slide up (y: 20 -> y: 0) and fade in.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Subtle Y-axis translation (hover:-translate-y-1) and enhanced shadow on interactive cards. Never scale up text.
motion_and_interactions.loading_button: Main 'Generar Estrategia de Asalto' button MUST have a dynamic loading state using Framer Motion (e.g., pulsing overlay, spinning icon). Disable button and change cursor to wait.
motion_and_interactions.markdown_generation: Simulate streaming of Markdown output using a progressive reveal or typing effect to emphasize the 'Elite Headhunter AI' analysis.
motion_and_interactions.tab_transitions: Use Framer Motion layoutId for a smooth sliding indicator between tabs (Perfil, Análisis, Historial).

components.landing: Custom HTML/Tailwind. Hero section with glassmorphism login card floating over the abstract 3D background image.
components.dashboard: Shadcn UI base, heavily customized. Remove default rigid borders. Apply the `glass_panel` classes. Tabs for 'Perfil', 'Análisis', 'Historial'.
components.cv_upload: Drag and drop area. Dashed border `border-2 border-dashed border-slate-300 rounded-2xl bg-slate-50/50 hover:bg-blue-50/50 hover:border-blue-300 hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-8`.
components.analysis_textarea: Focus state MUST have a soft blue ring `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-200 focus:border-blue-400 rounded-2xl bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm min-h-[200px] p-4 resize-y`.

hero_background.description: 3D frosted glass floating elements. Use as full background on the Landing page, set behind the glassmorphism login card, opacity around 30-50%.

professional_workspace.description: Clean, modern minimalist workspace. Use as an ambient background in the 'Historial' empty state or 'Perfil' banner section.

testing_attributes.rule: Every interactive element MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color hex codes requested by the user: #F8FAFC (bg), #3B82F6 (primary), #10B981 (success).
Apply `rounded-2xl` (16px) globally to all cards, buttons, inputs, and modals.
Apply the `glass_panel` CSS rules to main containers to achieve the 'Soft Professional / Glassmorphism' look.
Implement Framer Motion for staggered list animations on the Dashboard.
When generating the 'Estrategia de Asalto', the main button MUST show a clear, animated loading state (spinner + pulsing text).
Do NOT use generic fallback fonts like Inter or Roboto for headers. Link and use 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' via Google Fonts.
Ensure the entire UI is strictly in Spanish (e.g., 'Perfil', 'Análisis', 'Historial', 'Generar Estrategia de Asalto').
Never use `bg-transparent` for text overlays; use `glass_panel` overlays to ensure text is perfectly readable (WCAG AA).
Use Javascript (.js/.jsx) instead of Typescript (.ts/.tsx) as per the workspace context.
The output for the job strategy must be beautifully rendered Markdown with clear h3s, lists, and bold text.
